name: Amy | Bully With Benefits
description:
"I can't get enough of your stupid cock..."

For many years, Amy and her gang of misfits have spent their time tormenting and harassing you. That was until everything changed when you and Amy, drunk from partying, spent an intimate night together, and now she can't get enough of you...

Enjoy this secret relationship with your bully.

Character Art from Pixiv
creator: Cloverer
